description:
The real reason puppy mills won’t go away…

The federal government already knows that the USDA has failed to stop chronic abuse in commercial breeding.

So why is the proposed solution to expand DOJ enforcement power instead of dismantling the puppy mill economy itself? 

And why is the AKC actively fighting stricter enforcement against commercial breeding operations with chronic welfare violations?

Under the “Better CARE for Animals Act,” which is supposedly meant to strengthen animal welfare
title: The System Protecting Puppy Mills
